name: Handmade Wide Top Djembe Drum - 15cm
description: Bring rhythm and character into any space with this Mandala Wide Top Djembe Drum. Handcrafted from natural suar wood and finished with a genuine goat skin drum head, it produces a warm, earthy tone that makes it enjoyable for both beginners and experienced percussion lovers. The detailed mandala design gives this drum a calming, artistic feel, making it just as attractive as a decorative piece when not in use. Its compact size is easy to handle, whether used for casual drumming sessions, meditation spaces, yoga rooms, music corners, or as part of a bohemian-inspired interior.The traditional rope tuning and hand-finished wood create an authentic look with natural variations that make each piece slightly unique. A thoughtful gift for music lovers, spiritual enthusiasts, or anyone who enjoys handcrafted world instruments with personality and style.

Handcrafted in Indonesia from suar wood with a natural goat skin drum head, each drum has its own slightly unique finish and texture that adds to its artisan feel. name: Kashaka Shaker - Beach
description: This handcrafted Kashaka shaker brings rhythm, movement, and a relaxed, natural feel together in one compact percussion instrument. Traditionally played by rotating the wooden balls around the hand, it creates fast, flowing rhythmic sounds that are both satisfying to learn and fun to perform. Made from smooth Suar wood with a warm beach-inspired finish, each shaker has a natural, handmade character that makes it equally appealing as a musical instrument or decorative cultural piece. Its compact size makes it easy to carry, ideal for music sessions, festivals, drum circles, meditation spaces or creative play at home.The connected double-ball design helps create layered clicking and shaking sounds that can range from soft and calming to energetic and dynamic, depending on how it’s played. Suitable for beginners and experienced percussion enthusiasts alike.Handcrafted in Bali, this Kashaka adds an artisan touch to any music collection while offering an engaging hands-on rhythmic experience.
